NPHCDA PHC Readiness, Stock & Service Dashboard

A consolidated, executive view of Primary Health Care performance across Nigeria, organized around three simple questions: is the facility ready to deliver care, is it stocked to deliver care, and is it actually delivering care.

Overview

Top-level outcomes, coverage and system & trust indicators. Click any card for a state-level deep dive.

Click any state for its full profile across programme areas. Use the Filters panel (State / Donor) to highlight states here too.
⚠️
Scope note: the donor markers reflect the SRH/MNH donor map only (per SRH_Donor_map.pptx). A more exhaustive version covering immunisation, polio and other programmes is planned and should extend this view rather than replace it. State-level donor spend (₦) is a separate, still-open data gap - see the indicator workbook.

Snapshot by programme area

What this dashboard covers

Three themes - Facility Readiness (infrastructure, workforce, financing and governance enablers), Stock Status (commodities, equipment and the financing behind them), and Service Delivery (uptake, outcomes, community engagement and health security) - each broken into sub-sections of related indicators. Every indicator card shows its data tier (all states / select locations / not available), its source, and - where available - a state or facility-level breakdown on click. Use the map above for spatial views, Trend Analysis for time series, and Facility Deepdive for a searchable State → LGA → Facility table.

Trend Analysis

2023 – 2026, monthly / quarterly / yearly (mock series).
Indexed mode lets indicators with different units (%, ratio, per-100,000) be compared on one axis.

Facility Deepdive

State → LGA → Facility matrix, searchable and filterable from the Filters panel.
